## Outcome

Describe the user-visible or maintainer-visible website result.

## Why

Explain why this change belongs in starcat-site and which public surface it affects.

## Security and compatibility

Describe security, privacy, browser compatibility, localization, SEO, release, or deployment implications. State "None" when not applicable.

## Verification

- [ ] I previewed the affected page over HTTP.
- [ ] I ran the relevant checks described in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I kept paired English and Chinese content aligned when public meaning changed.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, tokens, private data, Nginx configuration, generated secrets, or unrelated changes.
- [ ] I did not deploy production or test infrastructure from this pull request.
